capsules.problem: FragCap auth skill was continuously polling auth-poll.mjs in a loop after starting Device Flow, wasting resources and blocking the session
capsules.author: gh:anonymous-fb2cd9da
capsules.summary: Changed the auth skill to stop after displaying the verification URL and user code, ending the turn. Polling only happens when the user sends a follow-up message, making the flow non-blocking and resource-efficient.

capsules.problem: Claude Code plugin Quick Start documentation needs to guide users through auth, capsule generation, and search without overwhelming them — but early drafts either listed too many steps or failed to show that search works passively (auto-triggered by conversation context) in addition to explicit commands
capsules.author: gh:anonymous-5c63148c
capsules.summary: Structure Quick Start as: 1) Auth (required, one-time), 2) Generate capsule (Option A: just describe your problem naturally — recommended; Option B: explicit /fragcap:push), 3) Search (Option A: ask naturally and it auto-searches — recommended; Option B: /fragcap:search). This dual-option pattern clearly communicates that the plugin works both conversationally and via explicit commands.
